zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注下方支撑测试
zh.content:
当前价格运行于1720均线下方，短线结构偏弱，反弹动能有限，整体仍处整理回落阶段空头占优但未破关键支撑区域需警惕进一步下探风险

MACD柱线持续为负且动能放缓，空头趋势仍在延续，但下跌速率有所收敛短期均线压制明显，RSI缺失但超卖迹象有限整体反弹仍受均线系统压制

下方支撑关注1682低点，上方1729与1750构成强阻力区间若跌破则打开下行空间至1650附近反之突破则看向上试探区间上沿

建议短线以区间交易为主，低吸高抛，控制仓位，等待趋势确认不宜追涨杀跌，严格设置止损防范波动风险关注成交量确认信号避免在震荡中频繁操作

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently moving in a tight consolidation phase after a modest intraday gain of 0.53%. Price action around 1694 sits just under the 20-period SMA at 1729, suggesting that short-term momentum remains capped despite minor upward pressure. The structure reflects a neutral-to-slightly bearish bias, with repeated rejections near the 1700 zone indicating that buyers are struggling to establish control.

From an indicator perspective, the MACD at -18.53 signals ongoing bearish momentum, even if the price is attempting to stabilize. Without RSI or signal line confirmation, momentum analysis relies more heavily on price behavior and moving averages. The negative MACD reading combined with price trading below the SMA(20) typically reflects weak trend continuation conditions, where rallies may be corrective rather than directional.

Key support is forming near 1680, which has already acted as an intraday floor, followed by stronger demand zones around 1650 and 1600 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance remains at 1700, with stronger barriers at the SMA(20) near 1729 and then 1750. A decisive break above 1729 would be required to shift sentiment toward a more constructive bullish recovery structure.

Trading conditions favor range strategies rather than trend-following setups. Short-term traders may consider buying near 1680 with tight risk control, targeting a rebound toward 1700–1725. Alternatively, waiting for a confirmed breakout above the SMA(20) could offer cleaner momentum entries. Until then, price action is likely to remain choppy, with emphasis on disciplined stops and avoidance of overextended positioning.
